_note: Hand-written MOCK NOISY code-reviewer output that mis-flags the already-batched loop (line 52) as an N+1 — a false positive on a clean_trap. gradeReviewerCase(...) MUST FAIL (fp=1). Demonstrates the grader catches a noisy reviewer.

findings.title: Possible N+1 query in the order loop
findings.body: The loop over orders looks like it could hit the database per iteration.
